problem id: d25d3b5f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10000010 -> 00100010
  11001111 -> 11110011
  00010100 -> 01000000
  10011111 -> 11110010
  01011010 -> 10100001
  01101000 -> 10000001
  11010101 -> 01010011
  00100000 -> 00000000
  00101010 -> 10100000
  01000011 -> 00110001

query: 11111110
predicted answer: 11100011
